# opnsense_system_info (Data Source)

Provides information about the OPNsense appliance: its firmware version and the list of installed plugins.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Always `system_info` (this is a singleton data source).
- `plugins` (Set of String) Names of installed plugins (e.g. `os-haproxy`).
- `version` (String) Installed OPNsense firmware version (e.g. `25.7`).
